description_long: This object is a small, lifelike bird with a streamlined body and a long, straight tail. Its plumage is predominantly brown with darker streaks and lighter underparts, giving it a mottled appearance. The head is rounded with a short, conical beak, and the eyes are positioned laterally, typical of many songbirds. The wings are folded close to the body, and the tail feathers are neatly aligned, slightly fanning out at the tip. The surface texture appears soft and feathered, with subtle color gradations and naturalistic markings. This bird would be commonly seen perched or foraging in urban parks, gardens, or along sidewalks.
description: A small, brown, streaked bird with a conical beak and a long, straight tail, featuring soft, mottled plumage and naturalistic markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, long tail, and detailed feather pattern along the flank.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical tail feathers and the subtle gradation of brown tones on the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's profile, conical beak, and streaked plumage along the body.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, beak, and the central alignment of the body and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: heavily streaked with dark brown bars and mottling on a lighter brown base
